title: T-002 — scheduler_assignments table + RLS + indexes
prompt:
# T-002 — scheduler_assignments table + RLS + indexes

PRD: docs/prd/07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §9.3, §15.4 V-SCHED-04
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce `scheduler_assignments` table holding draft/approved/rejected/overridden WO assignments produced by solver, with org-scoped RLS via the foundation `app.current_org_id()` function, four indexes, and FK chain to scheduler_runs(run_id) ON DELETE CASCADE.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0071_scheduler_assignments.sql`: CREATE TYPE assignment_status ENUM (draft|approved|rejected|overridden), CREATE TABLE scheduler_assignments per §9.3 DDL with `org_id uuid not null`.
2. ENABLE+FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + policy `scheduler_assignments_org_context` USING (`org_id = app.current_org_id()`) WITH CHECK (`org_id = app.current_org_id()`) — never `current_setting('app.tenant_id')` or `current_setting('app.current_org_id')` GUC. Four indexes: idx_scheduler_assignments_run, _wo, _status, _time.
3. Drizzle schema in `packages/db/src/schema/scheduler_assignments.ts`.
4. RED test asserts RLS (via app_user + app.set_org_context per org), FK cascade, optimizer_score numeric precision (10,2).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0071_scheduler_assignments.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/scheduler_assignments.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/scheduler-assignments.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0071 applied, when \d scheduler_assignments runs, then all §9.3 columns present, org_id NOT NULL, RLS+FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY enabled, four specified indexes exist
2. Given a scheduler_runs row deleted, when ON DELETE CASCADE fires, then all child scheduler_assignments rows are removed
3. Given two orgs and app.set_org_context called per org, when each SELECTs as app_user, then each sees only its own assignments
4. Given pg_policies is inspected, when the scheduler_assignments policy is listed, then qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() and contain no current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') GUC

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/scheduler-assignments.test.ts asserting cascade + RLS (via app.set_org_context as app_user) + numeric(10,2) precision
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test scheduler-assignments'

## Risk red lines
- Do not read `current_setting('app.tenant_id')` or `current_setting('app.current_org_id')` directly — use the foundation `app.current_org_id()` function so the NULL-safe setter contract is preserved.
- Do not use `tenant_id` as the business-scope column; per Wave0 v4.3 lock it is `org_id`.
- Do not omit ON DELETE CASCADE on run_id FK
- Do not skip RLS / FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY policy
- Do not relax assignment_status enum to TEXT

pipeline_inputs.description: Create scheduler_assignments table (org_id-scoped) with foundation app.current_org_id() RLS, status enum, FK cascade to scheduler_runs, four indexes, and override audit columns.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0071 emits CREATE TYPE assignment_status, CREATE TABLE scheduler_assignments per §9.3 DDL with `org_id uuid not null` + override_original_* columns, ENABLE+FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY with policy `scheduler_assignments_org_context` USING/WITH CHECK `org_id = app.current_org_id()`, four indexes. Drizzle schema mirrors columns with NUMERIC(10,2) precision for optimizer_score. RED test verifies cascade delete and org isolation via app_user + app.set_org_context. RLS uses foundation `app.current_org_id()` function (Wave0 decision; see `_meta/audits/2026-05-14-architecture-and-cross-cutting-gaps.md` §Tenant-context).
out_of_scope: Do not write approve/override API logic here (T-014..T-017)
Do not add changeover blocks (synthesized at view layer)

Given two orgs insert assignments, when each SELECTs as app_user post app.set_org_context(session_token, org_id), then each only sees its own rows (RLS via app.current_org_id())

Given pg_policies is inspected, when the scheduler_assignments policy is listed, then qual/withcheck reference app.current_org_id() and contain no current_setting('app.tenant_id'|'app.current_org_id') GUC

Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test scheduler-assignments'
